name: renkevia
description: RENKEVIA hospital change compiler — hackathon prototype

scripts.check: npm run verify:phase0 && npm run test:probes && npm run probe:preflight
scripts.check:offline: npm run verify:phase0 && npm run typecheck:core && npm run test:core && npm run test:probes
scripts.probe:live: npm run probe:models && npm run probe:structured && npm run probe:programmatic && npm run probe:multi-agent && npm run probe:computer && npm run probe:cache
scripts.probe:all: npm run check && npm run probe:live
